zh.lifeSummary: 當William Judson於1592年7月30日出生在英國越可爾吉可比姆希德時，他的父親William Judsonne14歲，母親Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York17歲。他於1618年11月17日與Grace Porter在英國越可爾哈利法可結婚。他們至少是4個兒子和1個女兒的父母。他於1641年住在美國康乃狄克州哈特福德哈特福德。他在美國康乃狄克州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文被列為iron works owner。他去世於1662年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年69歲，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

zh-hans.lifeSummary: 当William Judson于1592年7月30日出生在英国越可爾吉可比姆希德时，他的父亲William Judsonne14岁，母亲Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York17岁。他于1618年11月17日与Grace Porter在英国越可爾哈利法可结婚。他们至少是4个儿子和1个女儿的父母。他于1641年住在美国康涅狄格州哈特福德哈特福德。他在美国康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文易亞斯特 哈文被列为iron works owner。他去世于1662年7月25日在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂享年69岁，埋葬在布利提申 可隆尼亞爾 亞美利加康涅狄格州劍橋大學默里 哈文紐哈文 堂。

nameMeanings.name: Judson
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of American Family Names © Patrick Hanks 2003, 2006.
meanings: English: patronymic from the Middle English personal name Judd + -son.

variants.name: Getson
meanings: English (Middlesex): variant of Jutson, either a habitational name from Jurston, in Chagford (Devon), or a variant of Judson . This surname is now rare in Britain.

variants.name: Judd
meanings: English: from the Middle English personal name Judde, Jutte, a pet form of Jordan .

nameMeanings.name: William
nameMeanings.attribution: Dictionary of First Names © Patrick Hanks and Flavia Hodges 1990, 2003, 2006.
meanings: Probably the most successful of all the Old French names of Germanic origin that were introduced to England by the Normans. It is derived from Germanic wil ‘will, desire’ + helm ‘helmet, protection’. The fact that it was borne by the Conqueror himself does not seem to have inhibited its favour with the ‘conquered’ population: in the first century after the Conquest it was the commonest male name of all, and not only among the Normans. In the later Middle Ages it was overtaken by John , but continued to run second to that name until the 20th century, when the picture became more fragmented.

historicEvents.title: The Honourable East India Company
historicEvents.description: The Honourable East India Company, a British joint-stock company, was established in 1600 for trade in the Indian Ocean region. At its height, the British East India Company had a private army which was twice the size of the British Army, ruled large sections of India, and revenues in the millions.
historicEvents.urlTitle: Historic UK - The East India Company

historicEvents.title: The Pilgrims Board the Mayflower
historicEvents.description: "The Pilgrims boarded the Mayflower in search of religious freedom in the New World in September 1620. The Mayflower set sail from Plymouth, England, with 102 passengers, 40 of whom called themselves ""Saints."" After two stormy months at sea, the ship reached the New World. Nearly half of the group died during their first winter due to malnutrition and the harsh New England winter."
On April 24, 1638, a company of five-hundred English Puritans led by the Reverend John Davenport and Theophilus Eaton, a wealthy London merchant, sailed into the harbor.

historicEvents.title: The English Civil War
historicEvents.description: A series of conflicts regarding England's governance during the years 1642 to 1651 is now known as The English Civil War. Charles I summoned supporters to join him against his enemies in Parliament. In October 1642, nearly 10,000 men fought for Charles I and chased Parliament across the River Tamar. Fighting continued for years and was finally ended at the Battle of Worcester on September 3, 1651, with a Parliamentarian victory.

en.lifeSummary: When William Judson was born on 30 July 1592, in Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, England, his father, William Judsonne, was 14 and his mother, Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, was 17. He married Grace Porter on 17 November 1618, in Halifax, Yorkshire, England. They were the parents of at least 4 sons and 1 daughter. He lived in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, United States in 1641. His occupation is listed as iron works owner in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, United States. He died on 25 July 1662, in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, at the age of 69, and was buried in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

fr.lifeSummary: Lorsque William Judson est né le 30 juillet 1592, à Kirkbymoorside, Everwyck, Angleterre, son père, William Judsonne, avait 14 ans et sa mère, Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, avait 17 ans. Il a épousé Grace Porter le 17 novembre 1618, à Halifax, Everwyck, Angleterre. Ils ont eu au moins 4 fils et 1 fille. Il a vécu à Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, États-Unis en 1641. Sa profession de son indiquée est iron works owner à East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, États-Unis. Il est décédé le 25 juillet 1662, à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique, à l’âge de 69 ans, et a été enterré à Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, Amérique coloniale britannique.

de.lifeSummary: Als William Judson am 30. Juli 1592 in Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, England geboren wurde, war sein Vater William Judsonne 14 und seine Mutter Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York 17. Er hat am 17. November 1618 in Halifax, Yorkshire, England Grace Porter geheiratet. Sie hatten mindestens 4 Söhne und 1 Tochter. 1641 hat er in Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten gelebt. sein Beruf ist als iron works owner in East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Vereinigte Staaten aufgeführt. Er starb am 25. Juli 1662 im Alter von 69 Jahren in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America und wurde in Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America begraben.

it.lifeSummary: Quando William Judson è nato il il 30 luglio 1592 nel Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, England, il suo padre, William Judsonne, aveva 14 anni e il suo madre, Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, aveva 17 anni. Lui sposato Grace Porter il 17 novembre 1618, nel Halifax, Yorkshire, England. Erano genitori di almeno 4 figli e 1 figlia. Vissuto a Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America nel 1641. La sua occupazione è indicata come iron works owner nel East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Stati Uniti d'America. Morì il 25 luglio 1662, nel Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, all'età di 69 anni, e fu sepolto a Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.

ja.Yorkshire to Concord MA, early; Hartford: アメリカ合衆国ニューハンプシャー州コオスストラトフォード
ja.lifeSummary: William Judsonが1592年7月30日にイギリスヨークシュアイアキルクブイモオルシドで生まれた時，父William Judsonneは14歳，母Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of Yorkは17歳であった。1618年11月17日にイギリスヨークシュアイアハリファックスでGrace Porterと結婚した。彼らは少なくとも4人の息子と1人の娘の親であった。彼は1641年にはアメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ハートフォードハートフォードに住んでいた。アメリカ合衆国コネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンエアスト ヘイベンでの職業はiron works ownerと記録されている。彼は1662年7月25日にイギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンで69歳で死去し，イギリス植民地アメリカコネチカット州ニュー ヘイベンニューヘイベン トウンにて埋葬された。

ko.Concord, Massachusetts Bay, British Colo: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 마작세츠 베이 콜론이 콘코르드
ko.New Haven, New Haven, Connecticut Colony: 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운
ko.New England, British Colonial America: 미국 웨스트버지니아 주 마이언 뉴 잉글랜드
ko.lifeSummary: William Judson(이)가 1592년 7월 30일 영국 요르크실르 커k비모르시드에서 태어났을 때, 그의 아버지 William Judsonne(은)는 14세였고, 그의 어머니 Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York(은)는 17세였다. 그는 1618년 11월 17일 영국 요르크실르 할이파스에서 Grace Porter(와)과 결혼했다. 그들은 적어도 네 명의 아들과 한 명의 딸을 두었다. 1641년도에 미국 코네티컷 주 하트퍼드 하트퍼드에서 살았다. 그의 직업은 미국 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 이스트 하븐에서 iron works owner이었다. 그는 1662년 7월 25일 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에서 69세의 나이로 사망했으며 브리티시 콜론이앨 어머릭아 코네티컷 주 뉴 하븐 뉴하븐 타운에 묻혔다.

pt.lifeSummary: Quando William Judson nasceu em 30 de julho de 1592, em Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, seu pai, William Judsonne, tinha 14 anos e sua mãe, Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, tinha 17 anos. Ele casou-se com Grace Porter em 17 de novembro de 1618, em Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Eles tiveram pelo menos 4 filhos e 1 filha. Ele viveu em Hartford, Hartford, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América em 1641. Sua profissão aparece como iron works owner em East Haven, New Haven, Conecticute, Estados Unidos da América. Ele faleceu em 25 de julho de 1662, em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America, com 69 anos, e foi sepultado em Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Conecticute, British Colonial America.

ru.lifeSummary: Когда William Judson родился 30 июля 1592 г. в местности киркбимурсид, еркшир, Англия, его отцу по имени William Judsonne было 14 лет, а матери, которую звали Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, 17. Он женился на женщине по имени Grace Porter 17 ноября 1618 г. в местности хэлифакс, еркшир, Англия. У них было по крайней мере 4 сына и 1 дочь. Он жил в местности хартфорд, хартфорд, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты в 1641 году.  Он работал по профессии iron works owner в местности эаст хавен, ню хавен, Коннектикут, Соединенные штаты. Он умер 25 июля 1662 г. в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика в возрасте 69 лет и был похоронен в местности нюхавен тоун, ню хавен, Коннектикут, бритиш колоняль амирика.

es.lifeSummary: Cuando William Judson nació el 30 de julio de 1592, en Kirkbymoorside, Yorkshire, Inglaterra, su papá, William Judsonne, tenía 14 años y su mamá, Wilma Elizabeth Wilmont Thompson Marshall of York, tenía 17 años. Se casó con Grace Porter el 17 de noviembre de 1618, en Halifax, Yorkshire, Inglaterra. Fueron padres de por lo menos 4 hijos y 1 hija. Vivió en Hartford, Hartford, Connecticut, Estados Unidos en 1641. Su ocupación registrada era iron works owner en East Haven, New Haven, Connecticut, Estados Unidos. Murió el 25 de julio de 1662, en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America, a la edad de 69 años, y fue sepultado en Newhaven Towne, New Haven, Connecticut Colony, British Colonial America.
